description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish purse from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBlack bag with flap and press lock closure (press screws together to open)One main compartment Inner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsZippered pocket at back with brandingMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 19 cmWidth: 27 cmDepth: 5 cm
